The lords of the 12 yugas (five-year periods) in the cycle of
Jupiter are the following in order : (1) Vi§nu, (2) Jupiter, (3)
Indra, (4) Fire, (5) Tvasta (one of the Prajapatis or creators),
(6) Ahirbudhnya, (7) the Manes, (8) Visvedevas (the All-Gods),
(9) Soma (the Moon), (10) Indragni, (11) the Aivins, and (12)
Bhaga (the Sun).

The names of the five years in a lustrum along with their
presiding deities are (1) Samvatsara with its lord Fire, (2) Pariva-
tsara with the Sun, (3) Idavatsara with the Moon, (4) Anuvatsara
with Prajapati (creator), and (5) Idvatsara with Rudra.
